 Top Playstation Games:

Top 10 Sellers in Japan:
   1 - Beatmania Append - 4th Mix (Konami)
  2 - World Soccer 4W inning 11 (Konami)
  3 - Nobunaga no Yabo Reppuden (Koei)
  4 - Dance Dance Revolution 2 (Konami)
  5 - Front Mission Third (Square)
  6 - Wild Arms Second Ignition (SCEI)
  7 - Gettar Robo Daikessen (Bandai)
  8 - Dokodemo Issyo (SCEI)
  9 - Minna no Golf 2 (SCEI)
  10 - Broadcast Pro Baseball (Konami)

    updated on: 11:28:99   -anarckie


 Playstation 2 Tokyo Game Show:
The Fall Tokyo Game Show was held in Japan from September 17-19th at the Makuhari Messe in Kaihin Makuhari. TGS in held twice a year, but the Fall show is generally the biggest. In fact, this was the biggest show period, packing in more fans and industry insiders than ever before. The reason was obvious - Playstation 2 had come to town.

Although Sony had officially unveiled the PS2 earlier in the week, TGS was the first time the general public had the opportunity to get a look at the most anticipated videogames system in history. Demos of PS2 titles could be found all over the show floor, and Sony's own booth was a shrine to the PS2. A gaint screen at the front played a promo video every half hour, showcasing both the PS2 technology and its major video games. Huge crowds gathered for every show, making it the hottest attraction at TGS.

Countdown to the Playstation 2:
  Japan: 3 months to go
  USA: 9 months to go

    updated on: 11:27:99   -anarckie

 Anime/Manga Gaming:
Bandai is developing a new Mobile Suit Gundam action game for PSX 2 in Japan. Japanese release is scheduled for April.

Square is starting a reservation promotion for Parasite Eve II, scheduled for release in Japan on Dec. 16, those preordering the game at convenience stores will receive a keychain of Aya, and those preordering at game shops will receive a year 2000 Parasite Eve Postcard Calendar.

    updated on: 11:26:99   -anarckie
